Formula Cheat Sheet

Category Conversion/Formula
Weight1 kg = 2.2 lbs
Liquid1 tsp = 5 mL | 1 tbsp = 15 mL
Apothecary1 grain (gr) = 64.8 mg
Fluid Rate(Total Vol / Total Time in Min) × Drip Set
CRI(Dose × Weight × Time) / Conc
